descriptionTail: built on a foundation of proven global manufacturing and precision engineering.

features.title: Global Manufacturing DNA
features.desc: 77 Performance stands firmly on a foundation of global manufacturing. Every component we release has gone through rigorous R&D processes, not just generic product renaming.

features.title: Value Beyond Price
features.desc: Our focus is creating Sustainable Business. Our products are not designed for cheap price wars, but rather to provide consistent performance that builds your customers' trust.

manufacturing.label: 02 / The Backbone
manufacturing.title:
Built on
Industrial Scale.
manufacturing.experienceDesc: More than a decade of experience in precision manufacturing. We understand metallurgy, machine tolerances, and global durability standards.
manufacturing.supplyChainDesc: International distribution network serving OEM and aftermarket segments across multiple continents.
manufacturing.precisionDesc: Automated assembly lines & rigorous QC protocols.
manufacturing.volumeDesc: Tens of thousands of square meters of manufacturing facilities ready to support massive market expansion.

philosophy.label: 03 / Our Values
philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.desc: The standards we firmly uphold in every product we bring to the market.

items.title: Consistency
items.desc: Stable Grade A material quality in every production batch, without compromise.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: Precise and reliable parts durability for comfortable daily driving.

items.title: Trust
items.desc: Business transparency and full support for our distributor partners.

items.title: Growth
items.desc: A long-term vision to grow together in the modern automotive ecosystem.

closing.desc: Join the ecosystem designed for long-term growth and stability.
